name: agents-writing-skills
description: Skills and prompts for agents that write text without sounding like AI (v1.1: sufficiency / iceberg)

skills.name: humanize-writer
skills.description: Write new prose without AI tells (incl. Sufficiency / iceberg)
skills.use_when: User asks to write documentation, README, blog post, email, or any narrative text
skills.changelog: v3: added Lever 10 (Sufficiency / Grice), Lever 11 (Trust the reader / iceberg), over-generation patterns P-NEW-1…7, 7-step workflow with Tighten & Reader-fill passes, "Когда молчать" table

skills.name: humanize-editor
skills.description: Rewrite existing text to read human (incl. Tighten pass)
skills.use_when: User asks to humanize, de-AI, rewrite AI-generated text, or shorten verbose text
skills.changelog: v3: added Step 4 Tighten pass (8 scans: vacuum-filling, restatement, bridging, over-explanation, hedging, balanced framing, antithetical recap, Strunk cut-test), Step 5 Trust-the-reader pass, voice profile 'laconic'

skills.name: anti-ai-auditor
skills.description: Diagnose AI patterns without rewriting (incl. over-generation metrics)
skills.use_when: User asks to check if text sounds like AI, asks 'is this too long?', or wants a diagnosis only
skills.changelog: v2: added YapScore / Sufficiency estimate (per YapBench 2026), Cut-test pass, Reader-fill test, new 'Over-generation' report section, Sufficiency verdict

skills.name: ai-pattern-rewriter
skills.description: Fix specific AI-pattern phrases surgically (incl. over-generation spans)
skills.use_when: User identifies specific phrases that sound too AI or 'too long' and wants targeted fixes
skills.changelog: v2: added 'Over-generation spans' section with 10 rewrites (vacuum-filling, restatement, bridging, over-explanation, hedging, balanced framing, antithetical recap, etc.) + Williams 6 operations

install_instructions.opencode: Copy each skill directory to ~/.config/opencode/skills/. Each skill is a single SKILL.md file with optional references/ subdirectory.
install_instructions.pi: Copy each skill directory to ~/.pi/agent/skills/. Copy prompts to ~/.pi/agent/prompts/.
install_instructions.claude_code: Copy each skill directory to ~/.claude/skills/ or use the /install-skill command.
install_instructions.generic: Read this manifest, identify which skills you want, and copy the SKILL.md files to your agent's skill directory.
